metadata.title: Agenflow — Custom software that grows your business
metadata.description: We turn slow processes into growth: we integrate custom automation and AI so you produce more with the same team.

hero.title: We turn slow processes into growth.
hero.subtitle: We integrate custom automation and AI into your operation: the same team, far more business. We start with a consultation and stay on as your technology partner.

about.body: We understand how your business works and where it loses time and margin. Then we integrate the custom automation and technology that make it more productive, more profitable and bigger —and we run it with you.

services.title: First we understand. Then we build what makes you grow.

items.name: AI consulting
items.desc: We analyze your operation and find where to gain time, margin and capacity. You leave with a clear plan of what to automate and where to start.

items.name: Process automation
items.desc: We build and deploy the solution: we connect your tools and automate the work that slows the team down. Results in weeks.

items.name: Custom software by sector
items.desc: When your sector needs a tool the market doesn't offer, we build it. Specialized products, ready to grow with you.

services.complementary: Online presence — we modernize it so it captures and sells too.

items.label: Sector 01
items.name: Legal
items.desc: Law firms: we automate accounting-audit processes to remove manual work and cut errors. Fewer hours on repetitive tasks, more time for clients.

items.label: Sector 02
items.name: Real estate & construction
items.desc: Real estate agencies and property managers: lead capture, community management and document workflows without friction. Here we're building fincai, our software for property management. Construction and renovations, coming soon.

security.title: Your data, protected and under control.
security.subtitle: You work with sensitive information. Protecting it and staying compliant isn't an extra —it's the foundation of how we work.

items.name: GDPR by design
items.desc: We comply with EU regulation from day one, not as an add-on.

items.name: EU-hosted data
items.desc: Your information is processed and stored on servers within the European Union.

items.name: Contract & confidentiality
items.desc: Data processing agreement (DPA) and confidentiality signed with every client.

items.name: Encryption & access control
items.desc: Encrypted data and least-privilege access: only those who should, access what they should.

whyUs.title: We know how. And we build it ourselves.

items.name: You talk to who builds it
items.desc: You won't get a salesperson: you'll get the person who will analyze your operation and design the solution.

items.name: We build product, not just slides
items.desc: We develop our own software by sector. What we propose, we know how to build.

items.name: Sector focus
items.desc: Specialized in legal and real estate. We know the context; we don't improvise.

pricing.title: Tailored quotes. No shelf prices.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is quoted on its real scope. Tell us your case and we'll give it to you straight.

items.name: AI consulting
items.desc: We understand your operation and propose where to start.

items.name: Process automation
items.desc: We build and deploy the custom solution.

items.name: Online presence
items.desc: We modernize your website and digital presence.

pricing.note: Looking for our sector software? Each product has its own plan on its page.

finalCta.title: Ready to do more with the same team?
finalCta.subtitle: A no-commitment consultation. We'll tell you what to automate first —even if you don't work with us.

items.q: Do you work with companies without a technical team?
items.a: Yes. We bring all the technical side and integrate with your team. You bring the business knowledge; we bring the solution.

items.q: How soon will I see results?
items.a: The consultation, in days. The first automations in production are measured in weeks, not months.

items.q: How do you protect our data?
items.a: GDPR compliance, EU-hosted data, a confidentiality agreement, and encryption with access control. It's detailed in the security section.

items.q: I'm not sure what to automate. Where do I start?
items.a: With the consultation: we analyze your operation and tell you exactly what to automate first and what impact to expect.
Because knowing the legal or real estate context is the difference between a solution used every day and one that gathers dust.

consultoriaPage.title: Let's talk about your business. No jargon, straight to what matters.
consultoriaPage.subtitle: A working session with the person who will design your solution. We analyze your operation in depth, find where technology saves you time and money, and you leave with a clear plan of where to start.

forWho.title: You know you're losing time on work that could run itself. But you don't know where to start.
items: Your team repeats the same manual work every week.
You've heard about AI, but you don't know what fits your business.
You don't want a huge project: you want to know what moves the needle first.

process.title: A working session, not a sales call.
process.intro: We spend real time understanding your business and putting numbers to the opportunity. It's not a sales call: it's analysis. And you leave with something concrete in hand.

steps.name: We study your operation in depth
steps.desc: We sit down with you to understand how your business actually works: what your team does each day, where it gets stuck, and what steals your hours. Deep in the day-to-day, you stop seeing patterns; our job is to see them.
steps.takeaway: A clear picture of where your time and money slip away.

steps.name: We find the real opportunities
steps.desc: We cross what we've seen with what automation and AI can do today —in your case, not in theory. We tell you what's worth automating and what isn't. There are almost always two or three opportunities you didn't expect.
steps.takeaway: Concrete opportunities, prioritized by impact and effort.

steps.name: We hand you an actionable plan
steps.desc: No generic PDF: a plan with what to automate, in what order, how we'd do it and what impact to expect. It's yours. Run it with us, with your team, or with whoever you want.
steps.takeaway: A clear, prioritized plan, ready to execute.

expert.title: You're served by the person who will build your solution.
expert.body: No salespeople, no middlemen. The person who analyzes your operation is the same one who designs and builds what comes next. We know your sector's context —legal and real estate— and we speak your language, not a technical manual's.

finalCta.title: Let's focus on what makes you grow.
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us your case and we'll book your consultation. The plan it produces is yours —whether you run it with us or not.
